top_signals.title: Saudi Oil Flows Hit 90% of Pre-War Rate as Ships Exit Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia’s crude oil exports have surged close to their pre-war levels as the kingdom starts getting its tankers through the Strait of Hormuz again, one of the most emphatic indications yet that Persian Gulf shipments are normalizing in the wake of an interim peace deal between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasuries Rally as Jobs Data, Oil Prices Upend Fed Hike Outlook
top_signals.summary: US government bonds ended the holiday-shortened week with lower short-term yields after June employment data challenged expectations for Federal Reserve rate hikes this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Screwworm's Return to the US Sets up Yearslong Fight
top_signals.summary: For the first time in about fifty years, the New World screwworm is back in US livestock. Bloomberg's Ilena Peng explains how the parasitic fly will affect beef prices and how the USDA is responding. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hegseth creates powerful new drone office, pulling authority from the military services
top_signals.summary: The reorganization is the latest step in Hegseth’s push to field weapons faster.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: America Needs More Weapons. JPMorgan Wants to Add Its Firepower. - WSJ
top_signals.summary: America Needs More Weapons. JPMorgan Wants to Add Its Firepower.  WSJ
